nextStepMessages.JOB_READY: Congratulations! You are ready for the next hiring stage.
nextStepMessages.REQUIRES_UPSKILLING: Your profile shows potential. You will be connected with a suitable training programme.
nextStepMessages.REQUIRES_MANUAL_VERIFICATION: Your profile will be reviewed by an officer. You will be contacted soon.
nextStepMessages.LOW_QUALITY_SUBMISSION: We had trouble processing your submission. Please try again in a quieter place with better lighting.
nextStepMessages.SUSPECTED_DUPLICATE: Your application is currently under review. Please contact the nearest EDCS office if you need assistance.

processing.headline: We are reviewing your interview now.
processing.statusError: We could not complete processing. Please try the interview again.
processing.footerNote: Your interview is being evaluated. This may take a moment.

permissions.headline: Camera and microphone access
permissions.body: SkillFit needs access to your camera and microphone to record your video responses. Tap the button below and allow access when your browser asks.
permissions.deniedError: Access was denied. Please allow camera and microphone access in your browser settings, then try again.

landing.headline: Multilingual interview screening for mobile-first candidates.
landing.lede: Start in English, Hindi, or Kannada. The current prototype focuses on a guided transcript-based interview flow wired to the FastAPI backend.
liveItems: Interview session creation and answer submission
Admin login, stats, list, and detail view
